# Planora 🗺️

> Project planning, mind maps, and architecture diagrams — generated by AI, rendered in your browser.

Planora turns project ideas into structured Markdown plans, interactive mind maps, and Mermaid architecture diagrams. Available as a **CLI**, **VS Code extension**, and **local web app**.

---

## What It Does

```
$ planora init                     # Bootstrap a new project
$ planora plan --ai                # Generate full project docs with AI
$ planora web                      # Open dashboard at localhost:4173
```

### Generated Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `PROJECT_PLAN.md` | Overview, MVP, tech stack, milestones |
| `ROADMAP.md` | Phased development timeline |
| `MINDMAP.md` | Hierarchical outline → interactive mind map |
| `ARCHITECTURE.md` | System, data flow & component diagrams (Mermaid) |
| `HERMES_SETUP.md` | AI agent jobs, models, workflow config |
| `planora.json` | Project metadata |

### Visualizations

- **Mind Map** — `MINDMAP.md` rendered as interactive mind map (markmap.js)
- **Architecture Graphs** — `ARCHITECTURE.md` rendered as Mermaid diagrams
- **Dashboard** — All projects, one view

---

## Architecture

```
┌──────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌───────────┐
│   CLI    │  │  VS Code Ext │  │  Web App  │
│ planora  │  │  (palette)   │  │ :4173     │
└────┬─────┘  └──────┬───────┘  └─────┬─────┘
     │               │               │
     └───────────────┼───────────────┘
                     │
              ┌──────▼──────┐
              │  Core Pkg   │
              │ @planora/   │
              │    core     │
              └──────┬──────┘
                     │
         ┌───────────┼───────────┐
         │           │           │
    Generators   Storage    Analyzers
    (.md files)  (SQLite)   (repo scan)
```

Markdown is the **single source of truth**. CLI, VS Code, and the web app are just different views on the same data.

---

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install (coming soon)
npm install -g planora

# Create a new project
planora init --name "my-app" --stack "react,node,postgres"

# Generate all planning docs
planora plan --all

# Generate only a mind map
planora mindmap --title "My App Architecture"

# Analyze an existing repo
planora analyze --path ~/projects/existing-repo

# Open the dashboard
planora web
```

### AI-Powered Planning

```bash
# Setup Hermes agent for AI-assisted generation
planora hermes init --provider openrouter --model "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4"

# Generate plans with AI
planora plan --ai
```

---

## Monorepo Structure

```
packages/
├── core/          # @planora/core — models, generators, storage
├── cli/           # @planora/cli — terminal commands
├── vscode-ext/    # @planora/vscode-ext — VS Code integration
├── web/           # @planora/web — React + Vite dashboard
└── runner/        # @planora/runner — Hermes agent bridge
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Language | TypeScript (strict) |
| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |
| Monorepo | pnpm workspaces |
| CLI | Commander.js |
| Web | React 18 + Vite + Tailwind |
| Diagrams | Mermaid.js |
| Mind Maps | markmap.js |
| Database | SQLite (local-first), optional Supabase |
| AI Agent | Hermes Agent (planner, coder, reviewer jobs) |

---

|---|----------|

| 06 | [WEB_APP.md](plans/06_WEB_APP.md) — React app design |
| 07 | [HERMES_INTEGRATION.md](plans/07_HERMES_INTEGRATION.md) — AI agent integration |

---

## Milestones

| M# | Goal | Est. |
|----|------|------|
| M1 | Monorepo skeleton | 1-2 days |
| M2 | Core — models, generators, storage | 3-5 days |
| M3 | File generators — full implementation | 3-4 days |
| M4 | React localhost web app | 5-7 days |
| M5 | CLI commands | 3-4 days |
| M6 | VS Code extension | 3-4 days |
| M7 | Hermes deep integration | 3-5 days |

**Total: ~21-31 days**
